title: Source
description: A document ingested into the Research Brain

source_type.description: Format or origin type of the source

summary.description: Brief 1-2 sentence description of what this source contains

key_findings.description: List of key findings or assertions in this source

contradictions_detected.description: Any contradictions detected relative to existing claims

added_by.description: Who or what added this source

notes.description: Any additional notes about this source

source_role.description: Role of this source in the evidence hierarchy. primary_evidence = raw observation, test_result = live game test output, secondary_note = human analysis, derived_summary = synthesis from other sources

evidence_weight.description: Weight multiplier for confidence boosting from this source. Derived summaries default to 0.15, primary evidence defaults to 1.0

can_create_new_claims.description: Whether this source can be used to generate new claims. Derived summaries should be false (avoid self-referential evidence)
